description: Blending rustic suede with plush two tone leather, these woodland boots are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. High top styling with stitch seams at the toe box is a sartorial reference to the spirit of the adventurous. Wear these with form fitting denims and a dark formal shirt.UpperHigh-top leather upper with strategically placed overlaysThree-hole lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tonguePull loop at the heelPadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe box MidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and an upraised heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
